headline: You can still make purchases with your Spirit Airlines credit card
summary: Although Spirit Airlines went out of business, its co-branded Free Spirit credit cards will still work to make purchases.

raw.headline: You can still make purchases with your Spirit Airlines credit card
raw.summary: Although Spirit Airlines went out of business, its co-branded Free Spirit credit cards will still work to make purchases.

headline: Bank of America Shareholders Re-Elect Directors, Back Management as 2 Proposals Fail at AGM
summary: Bank of America (NYSE:BAC) shareholders elected all 12 director nominees and approved the company’s three management proposals at the bank’s 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders, while rejecting two shareholder-submitted measures, according to preliminary results shared during the webcast event. Boa

headline: The midterms could lead to less aggressive tariffs, BofA says
summary: Investing.com -- Upcoming U.S. midterm elections could reshape the Administration’s approach to both foreign policy and trade, according to a new note from Bank of America.

raw.headline: The midterms could lead to less aggressive tariffs, BofA says

headline: Umicore - Transparency notification by Bank of America Corporation
summary: Transparency notification byBank of America Corporation In accordance with article 14, § 1 of the law of 2 May 2007 on the disclosure of major holdings, Umicore was recently notified by Bank of America Corporation that it has crossed the legal threshold of 3% for the direct voting rights and equivalent financial instruments downwards on 24 April 2026. The total holding of direct voting rights and equivalent financial instruments of Bank of America Corporation stands at 2.93% on 24 April 2026. Su

headline: Circle jumps 16% on Clarity Act compromise that preserves stablecoin rewards
summary: Lawmakers over the weekend reached a compromise on the market structure bill known as the CLARITY Act that keeps stablecoin reward programs intact.
